free_text: Nucleus-nucleus total cross sections for light nuclei
at 1.55 and 2.89 GeV/C per nucleon.
Attenuation measurements were taken with hydrogen,
deuterium,helium and carbon targets. A dummy target was
included in the He target assembly. Target empty
measurements for the liquid targets were made using
this dummy target. For the liquid targets,the flasks
were mylar cylinders roughly 15 cm in diameter and 40-
cm long,with 0.18 mm domed end caps.
.Glauber Theory Predictions.
Slope-parameter results were reported.
Multiwire proportional chambers (MWPC),an
analyzing magnet and del'ta-E/dx measurements.
The thin (1.5 mm) scintillator,before the target
a large scintillator. Disk counter system consisted of
10 coaxial circular disk scintillation counters
mounted on a movable platform.The 10 disk counters were
fashioned from 1.5 mm thick scintillator plastic disks.
The Bevatron.
/by Authors/.Correction for elastic and inelastic
cross section, for Coulomb-Nuclear interference, for
contamination in the beam and projectile fragmentation
in the target, for interactions in the disc counters.
Tbl. IV, V, IX from PR/C,18,2273.
Systematic error. Since these measurements
are obtained with different targets, counter
geometries, and  correction techniques, their
comparison gives a good indication of probable
systematic errors.
Statistical error
Last checking has been done.
DATE is corrected
SD: SF3:NON -> TOT and SF8=MSC added in
REACTION code in Subents 2-17. Subents 18-29 were
corrected according Dr.A.Kohama remark. Data from:
Sub.  6 moved to Sub.  3; Sub. 10 moved to Sub.  4;
Sub. 14 moved to Sub.  5; Sub. 11 moved to Sub.  8;
Sub. 15 moved to Sub.  9; Sub. 16 moved to Sub. 13;
Sub. 24 moved to Sub. 22; Sub. 27 moved to Sub. 23;
Sub. 28 moved to Sub. 26.

the error is increased to cover the discrepancy,
